nodes.title: Note (!) important
widgets_values:
(!) Download and install the custom node RES4LYF to activate "bong_tangent" Scheduler

search in Manager by RES4LYF, install it

read about:
thttps://github.com/ClownsharkBatwing/RES4LYF

nodes.title: CLIP Positive Prompt
widgets_values:
Man itting on a couch in a sunlit living room. He is holding a cigarette in her hand and looking out the window. 
A dimly lit room with peeling walls and a window. The room is cluttered with clutter. 
The lighting is warm, casting shadows on the walls. 
The overall mood is one of neglect and abandonment.

make the subjects skin details more prominent and natural

(film grain:1.2), (high iso:1.1), visible pores, raw analog photo

nodes.title: *additional prompt
widgets_values:
👈 (!) Trigger words:

make the subjects skin details more prominent and natural

(film grain:1.2), (high iso:1.1), visible pores, raw analog photo

nodes.title: Note ModelSamplingAuraFlow
widgets_values:
Increase the shift if you get too many blury/dark/bad images. Decrease if you want to try increasing detail.
               👇

nodes.title: Aspect Ratios
widgets_values:
You can choose between 
a blank latnet image 
or a scale of the original image from ‘ControlNet’.

change the input data   👉

- 1:1 : 1328x1328
- 16:9 : 1664x928
- 9:16 : 928x1664
- 4:3 : 1472x1104
- 3:4 : 1104x1472
- 3:2 : 1584x1056
- 2:3 : 1056x1584

nodes.title: KSampler settings
widgets_values:
You can test and find the best setting by yourself. The following table is for reference.

| model            | steps | cfg |
|---------------------|---------------|---------------|
| fp8_e4m3fn             | 20                | 2.5               |
| fp8_e4m3fn + 4 steps LoRA    | 4               | 1.0               |

nodes.title: IMG input
widgets_values:
You can use uploaded images or replace to controlnet outputs

👈                     👇

Don't need 4-steps lora, because Diffusion model already included 4-steps

qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled_comfyui_4steps_v1.0

nodes.title: Model links
widgets_values:
[Tutorial](https://docs.comfy.org/tutorials/image/qwen/qwen-image) 


## Model links

You can find all the models on [Huggingface](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/tree/main) or [Modelscope](https://modelscope.cn/models/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/files)

**Diffusion model**

- [qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled_comfyui_4steps_v1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-2512-Lightning/resolve/main/qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled_comfyui_4steps_v1.0.safetensors)

**LoRA**


- [qwen_image_union_diffsynth_lora.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-DiffSynth-ControlNets/resolve/main/split_files/loras/qwen_image_union_diffsynth_lora.safetensors)

- [qwen_majic-beauty](https://huggingface.co/SHAGALOV/qwen_majic-beauty/resolve/main/qwen_majic-beauty.safetensors)

- [qwen-edit-skin.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/tlennon-ie/qwen-edit-skin/resolve/main/qwen-edit-skin.safetensors)

- [qwen-boreal-portraits-portraits-high-rank.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/kudzueye/boreal-qwen-image/resolve/main/qwen-boreal-portraits-portraits-high-rank.safetensors)

- [Qwen-Image-Lightning-4steps-V1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Lightning/resolve/main/Qwen-Image-Lightning-4steps-V1.0.safetensors?download=true)




**Text encoder**

- [qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

**VAE**

- [qwen_image_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors)

Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   ├── qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled_comfyui_4steps_v1.0.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │   └── qwen_image_union_diffsynth_lora.safetensors
│   │   ├── qwen_majic-beauty.safetensors
│   │   └── qwen-edit-skin.safetensors
│   │   └── Qwen-Image-Lightning-4steps-V1.0.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── qwen_image_vae.safetensors
│   └── 📂 text_encoders/
│       └── qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors

```

groups.title: To disable controlNet Bypass the whole group

nodes.title: About Scale Image to Total Pixels
widgets_values: This node is to avoid poor output results caused by excessively large input image sizes. You can remove it or use **ctrl + B** to bypass it if you don't need it.

nodes.title: IMG input
widgets_values:
You can use uploaded images or replace to controlnet outputs

          ↓
